## How to test

<!-- Steps the reviewer can follow to verify locally. For content PRs, link the page in the dev preview. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` in `frontend/` and it succeeds (skip for content-only PRs)
- [ ] No build artifacts committed (`docs/`, `frontend/dist/`, `frontend/docs/`, `.vite/`)
- [ ] If I added/changed a course problem, the `problems.json` is valid JSON and the `check50_slug` matches what CS50 publishes
- [ ] If I added a new lecture, I updated the matching `lectures.json` manifest
- [ ] At least one reviewer from CODEOWNERS has been requested
